strengths: Demonstrated consistent performance across multiple sessions with scores in the 500+ range
Shows familiarity with proper peg transfer technique and setup
weaknesses: Current session appears to be tutorial content rather than a performance attempt
Unable to establish clear timing markers for scoring

drills.name: Performance focus drill
drills.description: Execute complete peg transfer attempts with clear start and stop timing markers, focusing on maintaining your established 88-90 second performance window.
drills.targets_weakness: Establishing clear performance attempts versus tutorial content.

drills.name: Consistency maintenance ladder
drills.description: Perform 5 consecutive attempts targeting your established 88-90 second baseline while maintaining precision.
drills.targets_weakness: Maintaining performance consistency in formal assessment conditions.

progression_note: At the advanced level with your established 500+ FLS baseline, focus on delivering consistent performance attempts rather than tutorial demonstrations. Your historical performance suggests strong technical competency that needs formal assessment validation.
